identity.tone: Precision, Dark, tactile, Professional Audio Gear
identity.description: A focused, distraction-free environment for musicians and learners. The interface mimics high-end audio equipment—dark, matte, with precise lighting for active states.

layout_strategy.container: max-w-4xl mx-auto px-6 py-12 min-h-screen flex flex-col gap-12

Global.Texture: Fixed 'noise' overlay with 3% opacity to mimic film grain or matte plastic.
Global.Border_Radius: rounded-2xl for containers, rounded-full for buttons

Hero_Input.Input: w-full bg-studio-panel border-studio-border text-lg p-6 rounded-2xl focus:ring-2 focus:ring-studio-blue focus:border-transparent transition-all shadow-inner font-primary placeholder:text-zinc-600

Video_Player.Container: relative aspect-video w-full rounded-2xl overflow-hidden border border-studio-border shadow-2xl bg-black
Video_Player.Empty_State: flex flex-col items-center justify-center h-full text-zinc-600 font-heading tracking-widest uppercase

Control_Deck.Container: bg-studio-panel border border-studio-border rounded-3xl p-8 shadow-xl flex flex-col gap-6

Timeline.Thumb: h-5 w-5 bg-white border-2 border-studio-blue rounded-full shadow-[0_0_10px_rgba(59,130,246,0.5)] focus:scale-110 transition-transform

Control_Deck.Loop_Controls: flex items-center gap-2 bg-zinc-900/50 p-2 rounded-xl border border-white/5

History_Drawer.Title: font-heading text-xl text-zinc-400 mb-4 uppercase tracking-widest
History_Drawer.Card: group relative flex flex-col gap-2 bg-studio-panel/50 border border-white/5 hover:border-studio-blue/50 p-4 rounded-xl transition-all hover:bg-studio-panel cursor-pointer hover:shadow-lg hover:-translate-y-1

buttons.primary: bg-studio-blue text-white hover:bg-blue-600 shadow-[0_0_15px_rgba(59,130,246,0.3)] hover:shadow-[0_0_25px_rgba(59,130,246,0.5)] transition-all active:scale-95 font-heading uppercase tracking-wide px-8 py-3 rounded-full text-sm
buttons.secondary: bg-zinc-800 text-zinc-300 hover:bg-zinc-700 border border-white/5 transition-all active:scale-95 font-heading uppercase tracking-wide px-6 py-2 rounded-full text-xs
buttons.icon: p-3 rounded-full hover:bg-white/10 text-zinc-400 hover:text-white transition-colors

inputs.time: bg-transparent border-b border-zinc-700 text-center font-mono text-xl w-24 focus:border-studio-blue focus:outline-none text-white p-1

instructions_to_main_agent: 1. Setup: Install 'react-player' or use 'react-youtube' for the iframe integration. DO NOT use raw iframe tag if possible, wrappers are safer.
2. State Management: Use a simple 'useLocalStorage' hook for the history. No complex Redux needed.
3. Parsing: Build a robust YouTube URL parser (supports standard, short, and mobile urls).
4. Feedback: Use 'sonner' for toast notifications when a loop is set or video saved.
5. Precision: The 'Loop' functionality must be precise. React to 'onProgress' events carefully.
6. Theme: Force DARK MODE. Do not implement a light mode toggle. This is a studio tool.
7. Layout: Avoid centering everything. The Player is the hero, but the Controls should feel like a 'Dashboard' below it.
8. Testing: Add data-testid to the input, play button, and loop toggles.
universal_guidelines: Inputs should look 'heavy' and substantial, not like thin paper.
Always provide visual feedback on button press (scale down).
